situation: audit-2026-07-07-047 derived fix dispatch. Finding SZ-BG-L-002 (low): callAnthropicApi and callOpenAiApi both hardcode media_type as image/png, but upstream callers pass data URIs with actual MIME prefixes (e.g. data:image/jpeg;base64,...). JPEG/WebP images sent to Vision API as PNG causing decode failures or wrong recognition results.
action: Added extractMimeType() helper that parses the data URI prefix; fallback to image/png when no prefix present (back-compat). Strip prefix before sending to Anthropic (API expects raw base64); keep it in OpenAI data URL (now with correct MIME). Stacked on opt-background-1783213292 via case-104 direct-edit escape hatch (cp-guard triggered: worktree diverged from main due to prior unmerged SZ-BG-M-006/M-007/M-003 fixes).

next_suggestion: Continue audit-2026-07-07-047 derived fix dispatch. Next pending: SZ-BG-L-003 (setPanelBehavior called twice — redundant top-level call). 27 route-fixes remaining after this.

audit_findings.finding: callAnthropicApi hardcodes media_type as image/png regardless of actual image format. Upstream passes data URIs with real MIME prefix (parseImageSize/preprocessForVL strip same regex, proving prefix exists). JPEG/WebP sent as PNG → API decode failure or wrong recognition.
audit_findings.remediation: Extract MIME from data URI prefix via regex; fallback image/png for back-compat. Strip prefix before Anthropic call (expects raw base64); preserve in OpenAI data URL with correct MIME.

audit_findings.finding: callOpenAiApi also hardcodes data:image/png;base64, in image_url. Same root cause as Anthropic path.
audit_findings.remediation: Same extractMimeType() helper; construct data URL with real MIME.
